products.notes: Append the operator-approved phrasing: 'We are reviewing launching this on EC / vending; details will be posted on official SNS'. Most recent event: Sample Hall Pop-up 5/21–6/3 (ended).

rules: When responding about a discontinued / unavailable product, ALWAYS propose a currently-selling alternative (the No + Alternative principle).
Never recommend refreezing (food safety; operator correction).
Single-can purchase is available on Channel B (do not say 'set sales only').
